message:
Add comprehensive daemon client tests (54% → 77.3% coverage)

- Added tests for StartDaemon/StopDaemon wrapper functions
- Added writePIDFile edge cases (empty path, invalid PID)
- Added readPIDFile edge cases (empty file, invalid PID)
- Added pingDaemonUnix/TCP empty address tests
- Added GetStatusInfo branch coverage tests
- Added normalizeServerOptions test
- Added daemonRunning and processAlive tests
- Added tests for WithDaemonOrFallback, TryDaemon, MustHaveDaemon
  with running daemon
- Added GetFeatureAvailability daemon running test

Coverage improvement: 75.4% → 77.3% (session), 54% → 77.3% (original)
